name: interplay-maps
description: Plataforma GIS Profesional para la Gestión de Infraestructura FTTH

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/frontend && npm run lint -w apps/backend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push
